  • Method Details

    • getDefault

      public static RefinementRegistry getDefault()

    • getRootType

      public IInternalElementType<?> getRootType(String refinementId)

    • getRefinementParticipants

      public List<IRefinementParticipant> getRefinementParticipants(IInternalElementType<?> rootType) throws RefinementRegistry.RefinementException
      Returns an ordered list of refinement participants for the given root element type. The order is computed from contributions. In case no refinement is defined for the given root element type, or if a cycle occurs, null is returned.
      Parameters:
      rootType - a root element type
      Returns:
      a list of refinement participants, or null
      Throws:
      RefinementRegistry.RefinementException

    • load

      private void load() throws RefinementRegistry.RefinementException
      Throws:
      RefinementRegistry.RefinementException

    • extensionLoadException
